case_title: JAMES P. GREEN VS. LEE RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JPT ELIZABETH RILES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED (506). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED.
CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED OCT-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEE DBA  DON RAMON RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, JAMES P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEE DBA  DON RAMON RESTAURANT $3,214.15 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,349.15, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF A TOTAL OF $3214.15 PLUS COSTS. THE PAYMENTS MAY BE MADE IN INSTALLMENTS OF $500.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE TOTAL IS PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,187.91 FILED BY GREEN, JAMES P. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEE DBA  DON RAMON RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEE DBA  DON RAMON RESTAURANT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT ELIZABETH RILES FILED BY GREEN, JAMES P.
